name: Alemana
preceding_figure_names: Advanced Hip Twists, Basic Movements: Open, Closed Hip Twist, Curl, Fan, Hockey Stick, Open Hip Twist, Opening Out From Reverse Top, Progressive Walks Forward, Spiral, Spot or Switch Turn to L (Lady to R), Three Threes
following_figure_names: Basic Movements: Closed, Fan, Opening Out To Right And Left (Lady LF side on 6), Hand To Hand RSP (when ending to side), Side Step To Left commenced with LF (when ending to side), Side Step To Right commenced with LF (when ending to side), Cuban Rock LF (when ending to side), Syncopated Cuban Rock LF (when ending to side), New York LSP (when ending diagonally fwd in Open CPP), Spot or Switch Turn To R (Lady to L) (when ending diagonally fwd in Open CPP), Underarm Turn To L (when ending diagonally fwd in Open CPP), Natural Opening Out Movement (when ending Lady fwd toards Man's R side), Closed Hip Twist (when ending Lady fwd toards Man's R side), Spiral (when ending Lady fwd toards Man's R side), Rope Spinning (when ending Lady fwd toards Man's R side), Progressive Walks Forward in Right Shadow Position (when ending R Shadow Position)
notes:
This is really a signature figure for Lady. Make it count!
Lady may use Extended Forward Walk on step 4.
Alemana may start in Fan Position or Open Position (Lady steps back on 1 instead of closing RF to LF, make a complete turn R over 4-6)
Alternative Finishing positions:
May and Lady end to side (could be in closed position)
Man steps in front of Lady, forcing her to step side instead of front.
Another option is to finish in Open Position: last step Man steps fwd, strongly hold hand and have Lady step back.
Man and Lady end diagonally fwd in Open CPP
Man 1/8 to R, on 6 stop Lady's turn with L hand, Lady 1 1/8 R over 3-6.
Lady end fwd towards Man's R Side (normal for continuing with Closed Hip Twist) - sort of true Alemana.
Man turns body slightly R on 6 to lead lady towards his R side. Lady LF fwd in line with RF.
Man LF slightly leftwards on the next step.
Man and Lady fwd towards partner's R side
Man RF fwd in line with LF towards Lady's R side
Lead next and last step as position 3.
Man may take up to 1/4 R over 5 & 6, adjusting Lady's turn accordingly.
R Shadow Position
Man leads Lady towards R side as above
Continue to turn her R.
Lady ends LF back having made 1/2 turn R on LF during beat 1. Gain R Shadow Hold.
Alemana can be danced with R to R hand hold. Precedes with Hockey Stick or any figure ending in Open Position.
Then Man changes Lady's R hand into his R hand on last step and release hold with L hand.
Lady makes a complete turn R on Alemana.
Man takes last step fwd i line with LF towards partner's R side.
Lead next and Lady's last step as # 3 position.
Man may take up to 1/4 R over 5 & 6, adjusting Lady's turn accordingly.

comments: Side step; then step 6 would be a RF forward
Close RF to LF. End in Closed Position.
Three Fwd walks under raised arm LF RF LF. End in Closed Position | 1 1/8 to R over 4 to 6
Lady steps in a equilateral triangle.

steps.action: step forward to Man's L side diagonally
comments: "2&": LF step fwd to Man's L side, diagonally. Draw in L arm to front of body. Weight onto LF, On "&", RF brush (draw crescent moon) and point out (away from Man, no weight yet) to 2nd point in the triangle (middle in front of man)

steps.action: step on RF, turn upper body to R, hold LF
comments: "3&": step on RF, on "&", turn upper body to R, hold LF as long as possible, then sharp leg movement to place L leg.
"4": LF fwd step (could be to the side depending on next figure). Need to finish this step, settle weight with chest forward toward Man before next step.
